browse.configureApiKey: Configure your Google Fonts API Key in Settings
browse.noResultsHint: Try adjusting the filters or search

installed.emptyHint: Install fonts from the Browse page

favorites.emptyHint: Click the heart icon on any font while browsing

googleFonts.title: Google Fonts
googleFonts.description: To list Google Fonts, you need a free API Key.

about.title: About FreeckFonts
about.description: Typography discovery and management hub for Windows, macOS and Linux.
about.sources: Data sources: Google Fonts · Font Squirrel · FontSpace · 1001 Fonts · Font Library · Open Foundry

license.title: License
license.body: This software is distributed under the MIT + Commons Clause license. Personal and non-commercial use is free. Selling or commercially redistributing this software without explicit permission from the author is prohibited.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.body: FreeckFonts is a font management tool. Fonts downloaded and installed remain subject to the licenses of their respective creators and distributors. The user is solely responsible for complying with those licenses. The software is provided "as is", without warranties of any kind.

guidelines.title: Usage Guidelines
guidelines.body: Use fonts only as permitted by their individual licenses. OFL and open-source fonts may be used freely. Always check each font's terms before commercial use. Contributions, bug reports and suggestions are welcome via GitHub Issues.

onboarding.subtitle: Your typography discovery and management hub.
onboarding.chooseLanguage: Choose your preferred language to get started:

update.description: Version {{version}} is available. Update now to get the latest improvements and fixes.
update.readyDescription: The update has been downloaded. Restart the app to apply it.
update.errorDescription: Failed to download the update. Please try again later.
update.badge: New version {{version}} available — click to update
